title: pavonia zeylonica
intro: Pavonia zeylonica, also known as the Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Malvaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The herbal preparations of Pavonia zeylonica include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
